findings.description: The RST `.. note::` directive (a neutral informational note) is rendered as "**注意**" in the knowledge file. In Japanese, "注意" carries a connotation of caution or warning, which overstates the original. The source note simply provides supplementary information about a tool that can generate format definition files from specification documents.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses `.. note::` RST directive — a neutral informational callout, not a warning or caution.
